name: codex-usage-uploader
description: Upload local monthly Codex quota usage and set up reports repo SSH access.

interface.shortDescription: Upload Codex quota usage and setup access.
interface.longDescription: Reads local Codex JSONL session logs, uploads per-machine monthly quota usage grouped by week, and helps generate SSH deploy keys for the private reports repository.
defaultPrompt: Upload this machine's monthly Codex quota usage
Generate an SSH public key for Codex usage reports upload
